Entries.Title: Added wishlist function
Entries.Description:
In this update, we have added a wishlist function, where you can save money for items.
Use Manual mode for manual transactions or you can use Automatic mode, which in addition, moves your remaining money at the end of the day!

Entries.Title: Switching from SQLite to MSSQL
Entries.Description: The application will use Hangfire to schedule repeating jobs, so we had to move to MSSQL

Entries.Title: [v1.0.0] Initial Release
Entries.Description: First release of FlowBudget. Core features: account management, income and fixed expense tracking, pocket-based daily budgeting, and expenditure logging.
